# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Use GitHub Copilot to assist with code suggestions and completions.
- Ensure that your code is well-commented for better understanding and collaboration.

## Code Style
- Follow the .NET coding conventions for consistency.
- Use specific formatting rules as per your team's guidelines.
- Maintain clear naming conventions for variables and methods.

## Project-Specific Rules
- Work in Visual Studio 2026 and ensure that all projects target .NET 9 in this workspace.
